data.title: Mill City partners with Galaxy Digital for $450M SUI treasury strategy, enhancing institutional access to Sui blockchain.
data.description: In Wayzata, Minnesota, Mill City Ventures III, Ltd. (NASDAQ: MCVT) has revealed a new collaboration with Galaxy Digital Inc. (NASDAQ/TSX: GLXY), a prominent digital asset firm. As part of the partnership, Galaxy Asset Management from Galaxy Digital will take charge as the asset manager for the $450 million SUI treasury strategy at Mill City. This marks the largest SUI treasury in the public markets currently. Moreover, Galaxy Digital is a notable investor in the partnership.

data.title: nLIGHT, Inc. plans to grant multi-year, performance-based equity awards to CEO Scott Keeney and key leadership team members.
data.description: In CAMAS, Wash., nLIGHT, Inc. disclosed plans to provide special multi-year, performance-based equity awards to Scott Keeney, Chairman and CEO, along with crucial senior leadership members. nLIGHT, a top supplier of high-power lasers for crucial directed energy, optical sensing, and advanced manufacturing applications, is listed on Nasdaq as LASR. The Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors proposed these awards to recognize the outstanding performance of the team. The specific numbers or details regarding the size or structure of the equity awards were not provided in the announcement.

data.title: Lumentum expands U.S. manufacturing for AI-driven co-packaged optics, investing in a major capacity expansion. Creating high-skilled jobs.
data.description: Lumentum Holdings Inc., a leading optical and photonic technology company based in San Jose, California, has revealed a significant development in its dedication to innovation and domestic manufacturing. The company is set to invest in a substantial increase in production capacity at its semiconductor plant located in the U.S. This move is projected to create a number of new jobs in high-skilled engineering and manufacturing, contributing to the advancement of the United States' position in the global artificial intelligence supply chain.

data.title: Veritone reports Q2 2025 results: Revenue at $24 million, 45% growth in core AI software revenue. CEO aims for profitability by H2 2026.
data.description: Veritone, Inc. revealed its second-quarter results ending June 30, 2025, declaring an accomplishment in meeting the upper limit of their revised revenue estimation for June, which stood at $24 million. This success was underscored by a 45% growth in core AI software revenue. President and CEO Ryan Steelberg expressed optimism in sustaining this momentum, emphasizing the company's trajectory towards profitability by the latter half of 2026. The strong performance in the second quarter was attributed to various factors.

data.title: Partners Group supports Executive Order promoting private market investments in 401(k) plans, signed by Donald Trump, CEO David Layton states.
data.description: Partners Group, a major player in the global private markets sector, has expressed approval for the Executive Order recently signed by US President Donald Trump. The order is designed to enable 401(k) investors to engage with alternative assets, enhancing potential returns and diversification. It directs the Department of Labor (“DOL”) to collaborate with the Secretary of the Treasury, the Securities and Exchange Commission, and additional federal regulators to ease the process. David Layton, the CEO of Partners Group, welcomed this initiative.

data.title: Ripple acquires Rail for $200 million to enhance stablecoin payments infrastructure, targeting 10% of $36 billion B2B flows.
data.description: On Thursday, Ripple (CRYPTO: XRP) revealed plans to acquire Rail, a global payments company powered by stablecoins, for $200 million. This move aims to enhance Ripple's standing in enterprise blockchain-based payments through the integration of Rail's infrastructure and virtual account capabilities. Rail focuses on facilitating international business payments with stablecoins and is expected to handle more than 10% of the projected $36 billion in B2B stablecoin transactions this year. The collaboration between Ripple and Rail seeks to establish a comprehensive platform for stablecoin-powered payments, catering to corporate clients in need of efficient access to crypto transaction channels. Ripple currently provides a range of regulated services in the payment sector.

data.title: Tamarack Resort near Boise gains national recognition for luxury, named among the World's Best Resorts.
data.description: Located in Tamarack, Idaho, the newest inclusion in Travel + Leisure's esteemed World's Best Resorts list isn't located in Europe or on a distant shoreline, but just 90 miles outside of Boise. Tamarack Resort, the sole ski, golf, and lake resort in America, has rapidly garnered attention for its remarkable amenities and services.

data.title: SEC staff's liquid-staking guidance raises regulatory questions, could spark disputes - a potential boost for institutions utilizing the tech.
data.description: The recent release of SEC staff guidance regarding liquid staking presents a significant opportunity for institutions looking to integrate this technology into their products. However, despite the potential benefits, there remains a level of uncertainty surrounding the implementation of liquid staking in the market. This development has caught the attention of many, with industry experts expressing optimism about the prospects it holds. Overall, the guidance has the potential to reshape the landscape for institutions seeking to leverage liquid staking, with implications for a wide range of products and strategies.

data.title: Gilbane, Inc. names Veronique Bourgier, PhD, as Senior VP, Growth & Strategy Officer to drive innovation.
data.description: An accomplished global strategy professional has recently joined Gilbane, a renowned construction and real estate development company, with the aim of driving growth, fostering innovation, and enhancing overall value creation. Veronique Bourgier, PhD, has been appointed to this key role. The announcement was made on August 7, 2025, in Providence, Rhode Island. Gilbane, Inc. is known for its leading position in the industry and continues to make strategic hires to further solidify its market presence.

data.title: Minnesota Teamsters at Sysco ratify new contract: 230 workers, major wage increases, stronger pension, and job protections.
data.description: It has been reported that the 4-year collective bargaining agreement was approved by over 230 drivers and warehouse workers at Sysco in Minneapolis. The agreement followed a strike threat and includes notable wage increases, a reinforced pension plan, and enhanced job protections for members of Local 120. This development comes as a significant win for the workers, highlighting the effectiveness of collective bargaining in securing better terms for employees. This news signals positive changes for the workers, with the agreement ensuring improved compensation and job security for the foreseeable future.
BRAZIL'S VP ALCKMIN: PLAN WITH MEASURES TO MITIGATE EFFECTS OF U.S. TARIFFS IS EXPECTED TO BE ANNOUNCED BY TUESDAY

data.title: FTAI Infrastructure Inc. declares $0.03 dividend per share of common stock for Q2 2025; financial results released.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, FTAI Infrastructure Inc. (NASDAQ:FIP) released its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 in New York. The company, also known as FTAI Infrastructure, provided consolidated comparative financial statements and key performance measures in a press release. The information includes relevant data for investors and stakeholders to assess the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. reports Q2 2025 results: daily production up 37% to 31,576 Boe/day (51% oil), net income $25.1M.
data.description: Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (NYSE: GRNT) announced its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2025. Highlights of the quarter include a 37% increase in daily production to 31,576 barrels of oil equivalent (Boe) per day, with 51% being oil. This is compared to 23,106 Boe per day in the same quarter of 2024. The company's net income for the quarter was $25.1 million, equivalent to $0.19 per diluted share, contrasting with $5.1 million, or $0.04 per diluted share, in the previous year's quarter.

data.title: KLA Corp (NASDAQ: KLAC) declares $1.90/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on Sept. 3, 2025.
data.description: A technology firm headquartered in Milpitas, California, announced on August 7, 2025 that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.90 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: KLAC). The dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 3, 2025 to shareholders of record as of August 18, 2025. This move highlights the company's commitment to providing returns to its investors while maintaining financial stability.

data.title: Heron Finance expands client portfolios with Antares Private Credit Fund, adding access to over 3,500 loans from 11 sectors.
data.description: Heron Finance has expanded its offerings to accredited investors and RIAs, providing access to over 12 top private credit funds holding more than 3,500 loans across all 11 GICS sectors. As of August 7, 2025, the company is headquartered in San Francisco. This move aims to assist investors in diversifying their portfolios, with the addition of the Antares Private fund.

data.title: Graphjet Technology shareholders approve share consolidation at extraordinary general meeting on August 7, 2025.
data.description: Today in New York, USA, Graphjet Technology (NASDAQ: GTI) disclosed that its shareholders have given the green light to a proposal for share consolidation during an extraordinary general meeting on August 7, 2025.

data.title: New platform LawVine.com connects individuals with attorneys nationwide. Inaugurated by Law Offices of Jason Turchin on Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: A new online platform, LawVine.com, has been introduced by the Law Offices of Jason Turchin in Weston, Florida on August 7, 2025. This platform aims to assist individuals nationwide in engaging with attorneys, gaining insights on legal matters, and obtaining legal representation. It serves as a valuable resource for individuals seeking legal guidance.

data.title: Sherritt releases 2024 Sustainability Reports, including Annual Report, Climate Report, and Tailings Management Report. TSX: S.
data.description: In Toronto, Sherritt International Corporation (TSX: S) has unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Disclosures comprising the Annual Sustainability Report, Climate Report, Tailings Management Report, and Sustainability Scorecard. These reports scrutinize the Corporation's environmental, social, and governance ("ESG") performance. Highlighting their commitment to sustainability, Sherritt stresses its dedication to operating responsibly within host communities.
TESLA DISBANDS DOJO SUPERCOMPUTER TEAM IN BLOW TO AI PROGRAM

data.title: APAA praises Trump for aluminum tariff, Century Aluminum boosts US production by 10% thanks to Section 232 law.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) commended President Trump for implementing the Section 232 aluminum tariff. This decision has enabled Century Aluminum, the leading primary aluminum producer in the United States, to boost their production. The tariff has been instrumental in supporting the domestic aluminum industry and ensuring growth in the sector.
